evidence.snippet: The ultimate Hybrid-electric cargo VTOL unmanned cargo aircraft has arrived. The Nuuva V300 is a revolutionary design for long range logistics operations and cargo delivery. Built on the back of Pipistrel’s innovative design and technological advancement of electric-hybrid propulsion systems, the Nuuva V300 is optimized to deliver 600 pound payloads over 300 nautical miles.

Pipistrel’s special mission platform (Surveyor) is trusted across the world by defence, surveillance, and civil authorities in multiple configurations. Fully customizable the Surveyor can be deployed as manned, UAV or Optionally piloted and offers an effective low cost solution to the most demanding of requirements.

Pipistrel offer fully customised surveyor platforms to meet customers specific needs covering 6 models either as standalone surveillance platforms or turnkey UAV system. Typical mission options include:

items.notes: Pipistrel designs and manufactures complete aircraft including the Nuuva V300/V20 autonomous UAVs, the Surveyor optionally-piloted/UAV surveillance platform, and a full line of general aviation aircraft.

The birthplace of Pipistrel; with main focus on aircraft manufacturing, maintenance and aircraft sales

The Nuuva V300 is a revolutionary long-range large-capacity heavy-weight autonomous eVTOL UAV\* for logistics and aerial cargo delivery. It operates 10x more economically than today’s helicopters, requires no runways, and brings enhanced safety and reliability using Pipistrel’s type-certified electric engines.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Pipistrel designs and manufactures complete aircraft and autonomous UAV platforms (Nuuva V300/V20, Surveyor). Part of Textron eAviation since April 2022.

evidence.snippet: The Nuuva V300 is a revolutionary long-range large-capacity heavy-weight autonomous eVTOL UAV\* for logistics and aerial cargo delivery. It operates 10x more economically than today’s helicopters, requires no runways, and brings enhanced safety and reliability using Pipistrel’s type-certified electric engines.
The smaller sibling of the Nuuva family, the V20, shares the same architecture and advantages of the larger V300 but is designed as a lightweight cargo courier carrying payloads of up to 20 kg.

Pipistrel’s special mission platform (Surveyor) is trusted across the world by defence, surveillance, and civil authorities in multiple configurations. Fully customizable the Surveyor can be deployed as manned, UAV or Optionally piloted and offers an effective low cost solution to the most demanding of requirements.

ndaa.notes: No NDAA Section 848/889 mention anywhere in the corpus. Pipistrel is a Slovenian OEM within Textron Inc.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS mention anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: Taurus Electro was the world’s first fully electric 2-seat airplane in serial production available on the market.
In its 30 years, Pipistrel has grown from an enthusiastic hobby hang-glider garage manufacture into a world-renowned small aircraft producer, recognised by leading global aviation authorities.

readiness.notes: Pipistrel has sold 2,500+ aircraft in 97 countries with multiple models in serial production. The Nuuva V300/V20 UAVs appear to be in a pre-production / customer acquisition phase.

unresolved_questions: Nuuva V300/V20 production status — contact form language suggests pre-production meetings with prospective customers, but no explicit production launch date found
E-811 electric engine sold as standalone component or only used internally
tagline: Slovenian OEM producing electric and hybrid-electric airframes spanning general aviation trainers (Velis Electro, EASA type-certified), light sport aircraft, and autonomous cargo eVTOLs (Nuuva V300, V20). Also manufactures EASA type-certified electric propulsion (E-811 motor). Now owned by Textron. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence does not confirm active U.S. defense or allied government contracts.
